coverageSummary: Identity Module - Signup: CLIENT happy path with verification email
Identity Module - Signup: COMPANION happy path with profile creation, designation assignment, roster slot population
Identity Module - Signup: Duplicate email rejection
Identity Module - Email Verification: Valid token success and idempotency
Identity Module - Email Verification: Invalid/expired token rejection
Identity Module - Resend Verification: Success for unverified users
Identity Module - Login: Success with verified credentials and JWT issuance
Identity Module - Login: Rejection for unverified email
Identity Module - Login: Rejection for invalid credentials
Identity Module - Login: Rate limiting after 5 failed attempts
Identity Module - Get Me: Return user profile with companion profile for COMPANION role
Identity Module - Update Nickname: Successful update
Companion Profile Module - Get Profile: Success for authenticated companion
Companion Profile Module - Get Profile: 403 rejection for CLIENT role
Companion Profile Module - Upload Picture: File upload and URL return (without auto-update)
Companion Profile Module - Update Profile: Languages update with deduplication
Companion Profile Module - Update Profile: Profile picture URL update
Companion Profile Module - Update Profile: Invalid language rejection
Companion Profile Module - Toggle Active: Set to false (blocks matching)
Companion Profile Module - Toggle Active: Set to true (enables matching)
User Journey - Account Creation: End-to-end CLIENT and COMPANION signup, verification, login, profile access with authorization boundary checks
testExecutionNotes: All tests require local server running on port 3000
Mailpit must be running on port 8025 for email verification tests
Database must be seeded with venues for COMPANION signup tests
Rate limiter state must be cleared between login rate limit tests
File upload tests require writable uploads directory
JWT token generation must use same secret as server configuration
Tests validate both API response contracts and database state
Negative tests verify error codes match SDS specification
Journey test validates cross-module integration and authorization boundaries
All tests include cleanup steps to maintain test isolation
designDecisions: Separated CLIENT and COMPANION signup tests to validate different code paths
Included both positive and negative cases for each critical API endpoint
Rate limiting test validates enforcement even with correct credentials on 6th attempt
Profile picture upload test verifies file storage but NOT automatic profile update (requires separate PATCH)
Language update test validates deduplication behavior
Authorization test ensures CLIENT users cannot access companion-only endpoints
Journey test validates full flow from signup to authenticated profile access for both user types
All tests specify exact file locations following module ownership rules
DB assertions verify state changes, idempotency, and absence of side effects
Email verification tests use Mailpit for local email testing without external dependencies
nextSteps: Test Executor Agent to implement test runner that parses these JSON definitions
Create test fixtures (sample images, test data generators)
Implement token generation helpers for test execution
Implement Mailpit integration for email token extraction
Add database seeding utilities for test preconditions
Implement cleanup automation for test isolation
Create test reporting format for pass/fail results
Add CI/CD integration for automated test execution
